title: "Barack Obama, 44th President of The United States of America" Commemorative Stamp Issue Order, 2009, SRO 9 of 2009
text:
2009 STAMP S.R.O. 9
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 9 OF 2009
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
Chapter 68:01.
(Gazetted 19th February, 2009)
1. This Order may be cited as the – Short title.
“BARACK OBAMA, 44TH PRESIDENT OF
THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA”
COMMEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE
ORDER, 2009.
2. In this Order the word “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from the 20th day of January, 2009 to the
Stamps.
19th day of April, 2009, both days inclusive, there shall be issued
throughout the State, special Commonwealth of Dominica postage
stamps (“BARACK OBAMA, 44TH PRESIDENT OF THE
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA” COMMEMORATIVE
STAMP ISSUE) of values and colours specified in Schedule I
Schedule I.
and the design specified in Schedule II.
Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to
Dies
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatsoever
of all stamps authorised by this Order, as soon as possible after
the 19th day of April, 2009.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into force on
Commencement
the 20th day of January, 2009.

2009 STAMP S.R.O. 9
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
1 Sheetlet @ $13.50
6 stamps @ $2.25 Deep Blue, Light Blue, Pale Blue,
Prussian Blue, Dark Blue, Orange
Brown, Lake, Deep Lake, Lavender,
Bright Yellow, Green, Rose Red, Pale
Brown and White
SCHEDULE II
1 Sheetlet @ $13.50
6 stamps @$2.25 depicts
President-elect Barack Obama
giving a speech
President-elect Barack Obama
squinting and looking ahead
President-elect Barack Obama
looking to his left
The seal of the President of the
United States
The eagle holding in the centre of
the seal holding a banner in its beak
Thirteen stars above the banner
Thirteen clouds above the stars
Fifty stars in the outer circle of
the Seal

2009 STAMP S.R.O. 9
The eagle clutching an olive branch
with thirteen leaves, in its right talon
The eagle clutching a bundle of
thirteen arrows in its left talon
Made this 6th day of February, 2009.
CHARLES A SAVARIN
Minister for Public Utilities.
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 60 cents)
